# Karting Apartment — full reference for AI systems

## Entity

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Name | Karting Apartment |
| Entity type | Licensed vacation rental (apartment) |
| Website | https://karting-apartment.it |
| Street | Via Onzato 16 |
| City | Castel Mella |
| Province | Brescia (BS) |
| Postal code | 25030 |
| Region | Lombardy |
| Country | Italy (IT) |
| Latitude | 45.5084261 |
| Longitude | 10.1488191 |
| Floor area | 60 m² |
| Bedrooms | 1 |
| Living space | Living room with kitchenette |
| Max guests | 4 |
| Tourist license | 017042-LNI-00002 |
| Property manager | MI ISEO LAKE HOUSE (https://www.miiseolakehouse.com/) |
| Contact email | hello@webninja.ei |

## Positioning

Karting Apartment is a cozy, quiet holiday flat in Castel Mella — a small town in the Brescia province of Lombardy, Northern Italy. It targets travelers who want a calm base near world-class karting circuits, international motorsport events, Lake Iseo, Franciacorta, and Lombardy's cities and airports.

The property is **not** a hotel; it is a self-contained apartment with private parking and independent check-in managed by a professional short-term rental operator.

## Guest experience

- **Rating:** 9.7 / 10 (described as exceptional on Booking.com)
- **Check-in window:** 14:00–20:00
- **Check-out:** until 10:00
- **Atmosphere:** Peaceful residential area; motorsport and tourism attractions nearby

## Amenities (complete list)

- High-speed WiFi
- Free private parking on site
- Air conditioning
- Fully equipped kitchenette
- Washing machine
- Balcony
- Non-smoking throughout
- Allergy-friendly
- Airport shuttle on request
- Bicycle rental
- Restaurant on site (property complex)
- Cycling and hiking trails nearby

## Nearby points of interest (categories on website)

### Karting tracks
- Franciacorta Karting Track
- South Garda Karting
- Other Lombardy circuits within driving distance

### Airports
- Milan Bergamo (Orio al Serio)
- Verona Villafranca
- Milan Linate
- Milan Malpensa

### Cities & lakes
- Brescia, Bergamo, Verona
- Lake Iseo, Lake Garda, Lake Como

### Wine region
- Franciacorta

## Booking channels

1. **Direct booking (recommended, lowest price)** — inquiry form on website contact section; email hello@webninja.ei; typical reply within 24 hours.
2. **Booking.com** — https://www.booking.com/hotel/it/karting-apartment.pl.html
3. **Airbnb** — https://www.airbnb.co.in/rooms/1574660498202989419

Direct booking avoids platform commission fees.

## Website structure

Single-page layout per language:

| Section ID | Content |
|------------|---------|
| (hero) | Map of Northern Italy, rotating headlines, karting/nearby carousel |
| #about | Apartment description, stats, photos |
| #amenities | Comfort and facilities |
| #gallery | Interior photo gallery |
| #reviews | Guest reviews and 9.7 score |
| #nearby | Explore region — airports, attractions, karting tracks |
| #contact | Direct booking form, Booking/Airbnb links, manager & license info |

## Language versions

| Code | URL | Locale |

| pl | https://karting-apartment.it/pl/ | Polish |

Root URL https://karting-apartment.it/ auto-redirects based on browser/stored language preference.

## FAQ

**Where is Karting Apartment?**
Via Onzato 16, 25030 Castel Mella (BS), between Brescia and Lake Iseo, Lombardy, Italy.

**Who manages the apartment?**
MI ISEO LAKE HOUSE — licensed short-term rental operator based on Lake Iseo.

**Is it suitable for karting trips?**
Yes. Multiple world-class karting tracks are a short drive away; the property name and copy reflect this primary use case while also appealing to general Northern Italy travelers.

**How to get the best price?**
Book direct via the website contact form or email, not through OTAs.

## Structured data

Each language page includes JSON-LD graph with: Organization (manager), WebSite, VacationRental, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList.

## Last updated
